title: Maintenance Dispatcher Workflow
description: Morning dispatch routine for fountain maintenance: review the day board, find visits due, check who is clocked in, follow up flagged chemistry/warranty visits, and brief technicians before dispatch.

title: Project Status Reporter Workflow
description: Build a project or portfolio status report: health metrics, hand-off process steps, schedule (Gantt) state, and procurement blockers, composed into a stakeholder-ready narrative.

title: Time Kiosk Analyst Workflow
description: Analyze field-crew time: who is clocked in now, daily hour rollups per employee and project, and Job Interval to Timesheet sync health.

title: AI Write Confirmation Workflow
description: How to behave when writes are confirmation-gated: a mutating tool returns an unexecuted pending-action envelope; never fabricate results, ask the user to confirm in ERPNext, then retrieve the real outcome with check_ai_pending_action.
